demographics.living_situation: lives independently at a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I drank a large milkshake about two hours ago and now my stomach is completely blown up, making terrifying noises, and I've got explosive liquid diarrhoea I can't get away from.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on fast after the milkshake and the bloating and cramping are so bad I can't leave the bathroom — I wanted someone to check it's not something serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 90 minutes after a large milkshake and some cheese
symptom_narrative.character: explosive watery diarrhoea with a hugely bloated, distended belly, loud gurgling and rumbling, and lots of wind
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the bloating and cramps are severe and really distressing, and I keep having to rush to the toilet
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down across the whole belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on quickly after the dairy and has been constant since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing yet — I haven't taken anything
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just kept building after I finished the milkshake
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a lot of wind and loud stomach noises, and I feel a bit queasy but I haven't been sick
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get something like this most times I have a lot of dairy — over the last year or so — and it settles down completely when I steer clear of milk and cheese
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can move around but I have to stay right next to a toilet

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no ongoing health problems that I know of

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: normal mixed diet; notices dairy sets my stomach off
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home alone, called after hours because the symptoms were so intense

objective_data_offered.value: my belly looks really swollen and blown up compared to normal
you can hear my stomach loudly gurgling and rumbling over the phone
I look flushed and I keep rubbing my stomach because it's so uncomfortable
empty large milkshake cup on the kitchen counter
I've barely been able to keep fluids down because I keep running to the toilet
